SpriteGame
  • Package

  • Help

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AnimatedSprite
A sprite that creates animation by showing one sprite frame at a time.
Blob
A circular sprite with a color and a radius.
Block
A rectangular sprite with a width and a height.
CompoundSprite
A sprite made up of multiple other sprites that move together as a group.
Event
A flexible event system that lets different parts of your game communicate with each other without needing to be directly connected.
ImageSprite
A sprite that displays an image file instead of a drawn shape.
ScreenBehavior
Controls how sprites behave when they reach the edge of the screen.
Sprite
The base class for every sprite in the game.
Vector2D
A 2D vector â€” a pair of numbers (x, y) that can represent either a position (a point on the screen) or a direction with speed (like "move 3 pixels right and 2 pixels down each frame").
